hyperedges.label: Dashboard Parallel Data Aggregation from All Tables
Server-to-Client Data Fetching Pattern (Page → Client Component + Supabase)
Landing Page Hero Animation Pipeline (GSAP + HeroCanvas + HeroShaderScene)
Supabase Auth Guard Pattern (client + server + middleware)
Base UI Primitive Wrapper Pattern (all UI components)

nodes.label: Server Page + Client Component Split Pattern
nodes.norm_label: server page + client component split pattern

nodes.label: Row Level Security (Supabase)
nodes.rationale: RLS is enforced at the database level so each user can only access their own data; all protected tables have policies keyed on auth.uid() = user_id.
